<a id="kind-configuration"></a>
## Configuration

Configuration is the Schema for the configurations API.

- `Plural`: `configurations`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `zpr.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/zpr/v1beta1/configuration.md) (`config/samples/zpr_v1beta1_configuration.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.

<a id="kind-configuration-spec"></a>
### Spec

ConfigurationSpec defines the desired state of Configuration.

| Field | Description | Type | Required | Default | Enum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `compartmentId` | The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) of the tenancy into which ZPR resources will be bootstrapped. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `definedTags` | Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Operations": {"CostCenter": "42"}}` | `map[string, map[string, string]]` | No | - | - |
| `freeformTags` | Free-form tags for this resource. Each tag is a simple key-value pair with no predefined name, type, or namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Department": "Finance"}` | `map[string, string]` | No | - | - |
| `zprStatus` | The enabled or disabled status of ZPR in the tenancy. | `string` | No | - | - |

| `timeCreated` | The date and time that ZPR was onboarded to the tenancy, in the format defined by RFC 3339 (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339). Example: `2016-08-25T21:10:29.600Z` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `timeUpdated` | The date and time that ZPR was updated, in the format defined by RFC 3339 (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339). Example: `2016-08-25T21:10:29.600Z` | `string` | No | - | - |

<a id="kind-zprpolicy"></a>
## ZprPolicy

Manage OCI Zero Trust Packet Routing policies.

- `Plural`: `zprpolicies`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `zpr.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/zpr/v1beta1/zprpolicy.md) (`config/samples/zpr_v1beta1_zprpolicy.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.

<a id="kind-zprpolicy-spec"></a>
### Spec

ZprPolicySpec defines the desired state of ZprPolicy.

| Field | Description | Type | Required | Default | Enum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `compartmentId` | The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) of the compartment to create the ZprPolicy in. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `definedTags` | Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Operations": {"CostCenter": "42"}}` | `map[string, map[string, string]]` | No | - | - |
| `description` | The description you assign to the ZprPolicy during creation. Does not have to be unique, and it's changeable. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `freeformTags` | Free-form tags for this resource. Each tag is a simple key-value pair with no predefined name, type, or namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Department": "Finance"}` | `map[string, string]` | No | - | - |
| `name` | The name you assign to the ZprPolicy during creation. The name must be unique across all ZPL policies in the tenancy. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `statements` | An array of ZprPolicy statements(up to 25 statements per ZprPolicy) written in the Zero Trust Packet Routing Policy Language. | `list[string]` | Yes | - | - |
